description.value: Price 4,000 gp; Slot neck; CL 5th; Weight â; Aura faint abjuration DESCRIPTION This simple necklace contains an hourglass-shaped pendant with one black half and one white half. Once per day, the wearer can speak a command word to gain spell resistance 15 against spells and spell-like abilities with the light or shadow descriptors, as well as spells and spell-like abilities of the shadow subschool. This effect lasts for 1 minute. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 2,000 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item, dancing lights, darkness
